---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it maps to a WebRTC/IETF spec behavior, link it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — use case, references, willingness to contribute a PR.
